raw_consumer_statement:
Dear American Express, I hope that one of the representatives can call me to look deeper into the dispute that I have with XXXXXXXX XXXX The dispute number is : XXXX To sum it up, the dispute was rejected for 2 main reasons 1 ) The merchant agreed to take in the vehicle to fix it and 2 ) I signed on the sales agreement The truth is, the merchant blocked me after I sent them an inspection report from XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) that the car is still broken. They blocked my number and is unwilling to fix the vehicle. In addition, I never signed a sales agreement. If you take a look at the photo that the merchant provided on the receipt, the Merchant signed my name on the receipt without my knowledge. 


I have attached all the evidence in the CFPB report, please call me if you need additional information. In the CFPB report in XXXX, I received a resolution that someone tried to call me to collect information. However, I never received those calls. Please text and call me at XXXX.
